Text: .@coinbase @CoinbaseDev  x402 becomes the permissionless base layer for the long tail of the internet: indie APIs, open data feeds, micropayment-gated content, and any use case where creating an account before paying is unacceptable friction. 

@mpp @stripe @tempo  becomes the enterprise session layer for high-frequency, compliance-heavy workloads: SaaS APIs, cloud services, financial data, and anything a Fortune 500 procurement team needs to approve.
